calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-28-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing. Judge: Monica F. Wiley, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR #11722.

David G. Mendez was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Chris Borchich, sued as Chris Brochich Christopher.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on June 15, 2010.

Exhibit--1--Three-Day Notice to Pay Rent or Vacate dated 05/28/10....................ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff David G. Mendez, and against defendant Chris Borchich Sued as Chris Borcich Christopher as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $900.00.
Holdover Damages - $556.40.
Costs - $255.00.

Total - $1,711.40.

Additionally, plaintiff David G. Mendez is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1139 Market Street, #212, San Francisco, CA 94103-1513. The lease agreement is forfeited.

Plaintiff stipulated to the return of the Exhibit.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-28-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-23-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there are no appearances by defendant.
The trial date of JUN-28-2010 remains on calendar.
